class=\"zoomhint\">Terminal 2<\u002Fspan>\n          <\u002Fdiv>\n        <\u002Fdiv>\n      <\u002Fdiv>\n    <\u002Fdiv>\n  <\u002Fdiv>\n\n  <!-- Flow -->\n  <div class=\"flow reveal\">\n    <h4 data-comment-anchor=\"aee7c677c1-h4\"><span class=\"en\">Departure flow at Tocumen<\u002Fspan><span class=\"es\">Flujo de salida en Tocumen<\u002Fspan><\u002Fh4>\n    <div class=\"flow-row\">\n      <div class=\"flow-step\"><span class=\"num\">1<\u002Fspan><span><span class=\"en\">Arrive · L200<\u002Fspan><span class=\"es\">Llegar · N200<\u002Fspan><\u002Fspan><\u002Fdiv>\n      <span class=\"flow-arrow\">→<\u002Fspan>\n      <div class=\"flow-step\"><span class=\"num\">2<\u002Fspan><span><span class=\"en\">Check-In · L200<\u002Fspan><span class=\"es\">Check-In · N200<\u002Fspan><\u002Fspan><\u002Fdiv>\n      <span class=\"flow-arrow\">→<\u002Fspan>\n      <div class=\"flow-step\"><span class=\"num\">3<\u002Fspan><span><span class=\"en\">Immigration<\u002Fspan><span class=\"es\">Migración<\u002Fspan><\u002Fspan><\u002Fdiv>\n      <span class=\"flow-arrow\">→<\u002Fspan>\n      <div class=\"flow-step\"><span class=\"num\">4<\u002Fspan><span><span class=\"en\">Security / Customs<\u002Fspan><span class=\"es\">Seguridad / Aduanas<\u002Fspan><\u002Fspan><\u002Fdiv>\n      <span class=\"flow-arrow\">→<\u002Fspan>\n      <div class=\"flow-step\"><span class=\"num\">5<\u002Fspan><span><span class=\"en\">Duty Free · L200<\u002Fspan><span class=\"es\">Duty Free · N200<\u002Fspan><\u002Fspan><\u002Fdiv>\n      <span class=\"flow-arrow\">→<\u002Fspan>\n      <div class=\"flow-step final\"><span class=\"num\">6<\u002Fspan><span><span class=\"en\">Your Gate<\u002Fspan><span class=\"es\">Tu Puerta<\u002Fspan> ✈<\u002Fspan><\u002Fdiv>\n    <\u002Fdiv>\n  <\u002Fdiv>\n<\u002Fsection>\n\n<!-- ============ 07 — At the Gate ============ -->\n<section class=\"section\" id=\"boarding\">\n  <div class=\"sec-head\">\n    <div class=\"sec-num\">07<\u002Fdiv>\n    <div class=\"sec-head-body\">\n      <span class=\"t-label coral\"><span class=\"en\">Section 07 · Boarding<\u002Fspan><span class=\"es\">Sección 07 · Embarque<\u002Fspan><\u002Fspan>\n      <h2><span class=\"en\">At the gate. Group by group.<\u002Fspan><span class=\"es\">En la puerta. Grupo por grupo.<\u002Fspan><\u002Fh2>\n      <p><span class=\"en\">Airlines board in groups — your group is printed on your boarding pass. Be at the gate at least 30 minutes early; gates close 15–20 minutes before departure.<\u002Fspan><span class=\"es\">Las aerolíneas embarcan por grupos — tu grupo está en tu pase. Llega a la puerta al menos 30 minutos antes; las puertas cierran 15–20 minutos antes de la salida.<\u002Fspan><\u002Fp>\n    <\u002Fdiv>\n  <\u002Fdiv>\n\n  <div class=\"boarding-grid reveal\">\n    <div class=\"queue\">\n      <div class=\"q-item g1\">\n        <div class=\"gnum\">1<\u002Fdiv>\n        <div><div class=\"gtitle\"><span class=\"en\">First / Business<\u002Fspan><span class=\"es\">First / Business<\u002Fspan><\u002Fdiv><div class=\"gsub\"><span class=\"en\">Priority cabins board first<\u002Fspan><span class=\"es\">Cabinas prioritarias primero<\u002Fspan><\u002Fdiv><\u002Fdiv>\n        <span class=\"tag\">Priority<\u002Fspan>\n      <\u002Fdiv>\n      <div class=\"q-item g2\">\n        <div class=\"gnum\">2<\u002Fdiv>\n        <div><div class=\"gtitle\"><span class=\"en\">Priority &amp; Status<\u002Fspan><span class=\"es\">Priority y Status<\u002Fspan><\u002Fdiv><div class=\"gsub\"><span class=\"en\">Frequent flyers, alliance elites<\u002Fspan><span class=\"es\">Viajeros frecuentes, élites de alianza<\u002Fspan><\u002Fdiv><\u002Fdiv>\n        <span class=\"tag\">Elite<\u002Fspan>\n      <\u002Fdiv>\n      <div class=\"q-item g3\">\n        <div class=\"gnum\">3<\u002Fdiv>\n        <div><div class=\"gtitle\" data-comment-anchor=\"65869a7494-div\">Group A<\u002Fdiv><div class=\"gsub\"><span class=\"en\">Main Economy · forward rows<\u002Fspan><span class=\"es\">Economy principal · filas delanteras<\u002Fspan><\u002Fdiv><\u002Fdiv>\n        <span class=\"tag\">Group A<\u002Fspan>\n      <\u002Fdiv>\n      <div class=\"q-item g4\">\n        <div class=\"gnum\">4<\u002Fdiv>\n        <div><div class=\"gtitle\">Group B<\u002Fdiv><div class=\"gsub\"><span class=\"en\">Middle rows<\u002Fspan><span class=\"es\">Filas centrales<\u002Fspan><\u002Fdiv><\u002Fdiv>\n        <span class=\"tag\">Group B<\u002Fspan>\n      <\u002Fdiv>\n      <div class=\"q-item g5\">\n        <div class=\"gnum\">5<\u002Fdiv>\n        <div><div class=\"gtitle\">Group C<\u002Fdiv><div class=\"gsub\"><span class=\"en\">Rear rows / basic fares<\u002Fspan><span class=\"es\">Filas traseras / básico<\u002Fspan><\u002Fdiv><\u002Fdiv>\n        <span class=\"tag\">Group C<\u002Fspan>\n      <\u002Fdiv>\n    <\u002Fdiv>\n    <div class=\"bp-info\">\n      <div class=\"bp-mini\">\n        <div>\n          <div class=\"route\">PTY <span class=\"arr\">→<\u002Fspan> WORLD<\u002Fdiv>\n          <div class=\"meta-row\"><span class=\"en\">Group 3 · Seat 15B · Gate 209<\u002Fspan><span class=\"es\">Grupo 3 · Asiento 15B · Puerta 209<\u002Fspan><\u002Fdiv>\n        <\u002Fdiv>\n        <div class=\"qr\" aria-hidden=\"true\">\n          <i class=\"on\"><\u002Fi><i class=\"on\"><\u002Fi><i class=\"on\"><\u002Fi><i><\u002Fi><i class=\"on\"><\u002Fi><i><\u002Fi><i class=\"on\"><\u002Fi>\n          <i class=\"on\"><\u002Fi><i><\u002Fi><i class=\"on\"><\u002Fi><i><\u002Fi><i><\u002Fi><i class=\"on\"><\u002Fi><i><\u002Fi>\n          <i class=\"on\"><\u002Fi><i><\u002Fi><i><\u002Fi><i class=\"on\"><\u002Fi><i class=\"on\"><\u002Fi><i><\u002Fi><i class=\"on\"><\u002Fi>\n          <i><\u002Fi><i class=\"on\"><\u002Fi><i><\u002Fi><i><\u002Fi><i><\u002Fi><i class=\"on\"><\u002Fi><i><\u002Fi>\n          <i class=\"on\"><\u002Fi><i><\u002Fi><i class=\"on\"><\u002Fi><i class=\"on\"><\u002Fi><i><\u002Fi><i class=\"on\"><\u002Fi><i class=\"on\"><\u002Fi>\n          <i><\u002Fi><i class=\"on\"><\u002Fi><i><\u002Fi><i class=\"on\"><\u002Fi><i class=\"on\"><\u002Fi><i><\u002Fi><i><\u002Fi>\n          <i class=\"on\"><\u002Fi><i><\u002Fi><i class=\"on\"><\u002Fi><i><\u002Fi><i><\u002Fi><i class=\"on\"><\u002Fi><i class=\"on\"><\u002Fi>\n        <\u002Fdiv>\n      <\u002Fdiv>\n      <div class=\"card\">\n        <h4><span class=\"en\">Digital or printed?<\u002Fspan><span class=\"es\">¿Digital o impreso?<\u002Fspan><\u002Fh4>\n        <p><span class=\"en\">Both work at Tocumen. Digital passes are scanned at security and the gate. Keep a backup printed copy in case your phone dies.<\u002Fspan><span class=\"es\">Ambos funcionan en Tocumen. Los pases digitales se escanean en seguridad y la puerta. Lleva una copia impresa por si tu teléfono se apaga.<\u002Fspan><\u002Fp>\n      <\u002Fdiv>\n      <div class=\"callout warning\" style=\"margin:0\">\n        <strong><span class=\"en\">Gate closes 15–20 minutes before departure.<\u002Fspan><span class=\"es\">La puerta cierra 15–20 minutos antes.<\u002Fspan><\u002Fstrong>\n        <span class=\"en\"> Be there at least 30 minutes early. If the gate closes, you will not board.<\u002Fspan>\n        <span class=\"es\"> Llega al menos 30 minutos antes. Si la puerta cierra, no podrás abordar.<\u002Fspan>\n      <\u002Fdiv>\n    <\u002Fdiv>\n  <\u002Fdiv>\n<\u002Fsection>\n\n<!-- ============ 08 — Flight Disruptions ============ -->\n<section class=\"section\" id=\"disruptions\">\n  <div class=\"sec-head\">\n    <div class=\"sec-num\">08<\u002Fdiv>\n    <div class=\"sec-head-body\">\n      <span class=\"t-label coral\"><span class=\"en\">Section 08 · When things go wrong<\u002Fspan><span class=\"es\">Sección 08 · Si algo sale mal<\u002Fspan><\u002Fspan>\n      <h2><span class=\"en\">Disruptions happen.<br>We're a phone call away.<\u002Fspan><span class=\"es\">Las interrupciones pasan.<br>Estamos a una llamada.<\u002Fspan><\u002Fh2>\n      <p><span class=\"en\">Delays, cancellations, missed connections — here's what to do. After hours, call the emergency line; voice only. WhatsApp and SMS do not activate protocol.<\u002Fspan><span class=\"es\">Retrasos, cancelaciones, conexiones perdidas — aquí qué hacer. Fuera de horario, llama a la línea de emergencia; solo voz. WhatsApp y SMS no activan el protocolo.<\u002Fspan><\u002Fp>\n    <\u002Fdiv>\n  <\u002Fdiv>\n\n  <!-- BIG RED EMERGENCY BANNER -->\n  <div class=\"emergency reveal\" role=\"alert\">\n    <div class=\"grid\">\n      <div class=\"em-badge\" aria-hidden=\"true\">\n        <svg viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\"><path d=\"M22 16.92v3a2 2 0 0 1-2.18 2 19.79 19.79 0 0 1-8.63-3.07 19.5 19.5 0 0 1-6-6 19.79 19.79 0 0 1-3.07-8.67A2 2 0 0 1 4.11 2h3a2 2 0 0 1 2 1.72c.13.96.36 1.9.7 2.81a2 2 0 0 1-.45 2.11L8.09 9.91a16 16 0 0 0 6 6l1.27-1.27a2 2 0 0 1 2.11-.45c.91.34 1.85.57 2.81.7A2 2 0 0 1 22 16.92z\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2.3\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\"><\u002Fpath><\u002Fsvg>\n      <\u002Fdiv>\n      <div class=\"em-text\">\n        <div class=\"lab\"><span class=\"en\">After-Hours Flight Emergency · 24/7<\u002Fspan><span class=\"es\">Emergencia Fuera de Horario · 24/7<\u002Fspan><\u002Fdiv>\n        <h3><span class=\"en\">Call this number, voice only.<\u002Fspan><span class=\"es\">Llama a este número, solo voz.<\u002Fspan><\u002Fh3>\n        <p><span class=\"en\">For cancellations, missed connections, and rebooking outside business hours. Messages via WhatsApp or SMS <strong>will not activate<\u002Fstrong> the emergency protocol.<\u002Fspan><span class=\"es\">Para cancelaciones, conexiones perdidas y rebooking fuera de horario. Los mensajes por WhatsApp o SMS <strong>no activan<\u002Fstrong> el protocolo de emergencia.<\u002Fspan><\u002Fp>\n      <\u002Fdiv>\n      <div class=\"em-cta\">\n        <a class=\"em-call\" href=\"tel:+50766124677\">\n          <span class=\"iring\"><svg width=\"20\" height=\"20\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\"><path d=\"M22 16.92v3a2 2 0 0 1-2.18 2 19.79 19.79 0 0 1-8.63-3.07 19.5 19.5 0 0 1-6-6 19.79 19.79 0 0 1-3.07-8.67A2 2 0 0 1 4.11 2h3a2 2 0 0 1 2 1.72c.13.96.36 1.9.7 2.81a2 2 0 0 1-.45 2.11L8.09 9.91a16 16 0 0 0 6 6l1.27-1.27a2 2 0 0 1 2.11-.45c.91.34 1.85.57 2.81.7A2 2 0 0 1 22 16.92z\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2.4\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\"><\u002Fpath><\u002Fsvg><\u002Fspan>\n          <span><span class=\"lab\"><span class=\"en\">Tap to call now<\u002Fspan><span class=\"es\">Toca para llamar<\u002Fspan><\u002Fspan><span class=\"num\">+507 6612 4677<\u002Fspan><\u002Fspan>\n        <\u002Fa>\n        <div class=\"em-warn\"><span><span class=\"en\"><strong>Voice only.<\u002Fstrong> No WhatsApp / SMS.<\u002Fspan><span class=\"es\"><strong>Solo voz.<\u002Fstrong> Sin WhatsApp / SMS.<\u002Fspan><\u002Fspan><\u002Fdiv>\n      <\u002Fdiv>\n    <\u002Fdiv>\n  <\u002Fdiv>\n\n  <div class=\"acc reveal\" style=\"margin-top:24px\">\n    <div class=\"acc-item open\">\n      <button class=\"acc-head\" onclick=\"toggleAcc(this)\" aria-expanded=\"true\">\n        <div class=\"ico\" style=\"background:var(--warning-bg);color:var(--warning)\"><svg width=\"20\" height=\"20\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\"><circle cx=\"12\" cy=\"12\" r=\"9\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\"><\u002Fcircle><path d=\"M12 7v5l3 2\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\" stroke-linecap=\"round\"><\u002Fpath><\u002Fsvg><\u002Fdiv>\n        <span><span class=\"en\">Flight delayed<\u002Fspan><span class=\"es\">Vuelo retrasado<\u002Fspan><\u002Fspan>\n        <span class=\"arrow\"><svg width=\"14\" height=\"14\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\"><path d=\"M6 9l6 6 6-6\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2.5\" stroke-linecap=\"round\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\"><\u002Fpath><\u002Fsvg><\u002Fspan>\n      <\u002Fbutton>\n      <div class=\"acc-body\"><div><div><span class=\"en\">Stay near your gate and monitor the screens. Check the airline app for real-time updates. For delays over 2 hours, ask about meal vouchers or rebooking. Contact CWTSatoTravel if you are on official travel.<\u002Fspan><span class=\"es\">Quédate cerca de tu puerta y monitorea las pantallas. Revisa la app de la aerolínea. Para retrasos de más de 2 horas, pregunta por vouchers o rebooking. Contacta a CWTSatoTravel si es viaje oficial.<\u002Fspan><\u002Fdiv><\u002Fdiv><\u002Fdiv>\n    <\u002Fdiv>\n    <div class=\"acc-item\">\n      <button class=\"acc-head\" onclick=\"toggleAcc(this)\" aria-expanded=\"false\">\n        <div class=\"ico\" style=\"background:var(--error-bg);color:var(--error)\"><svg width=\"20\" height=\"20\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\"><circle cx=\"12\" cy=\"12\" r=\"9\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\"><\u002Fcircle><path d=\"M9 9l6 6M15 9l-6 6\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\" stroke-linecap=\"round\"><\u002Fpath><\u002Fsvg><\u002Fdiv>\n        <span><span class=\"en\">Flight cancelled<\u002Fspan><span class=\"es\">Vuelo cancelado<\u002Fspan><\u002Fspan>\n        <span class=\"arrow\"><svg width=\"14\" height=\"14\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\"><path d=\"M6 9l6 6 6-6\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2.5\" stroke-linecap=\"round\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\"><\u002Fpath><\u002Fsvg><\u002Fspan>\n      <\u002Fbutton>\n      <div class=\"acc-body\"><div><div><span class=\"en\">Go to the airline counter or call customer service immediately. Airlines must rebook you on the next available flight at no extra cost. For official travel, call the CWTSatoTravel emergency line right away.<\u002Fspan><span class=\"es\">Ve al mostrador o llama a servicio al cliente de inmediato. Las aerolíneas deben reubicarte en el siguiente vuelo sin costo adicional. Para viajes oficiales, llama a la línea de emergencia de CWTSatoTravel.<\u002Fspan><\u002Fdiv><\u002Fdiv><\u002Fdiv>\n    <\u002Fdiv>\n    <div class=\"acc-item\">\n      <button class=\"acc-head\" onclick=\"toggleAcc(this)\" aria-expanded=\"false\">\n        <div class=\"ico\" style=\"background:var(--gold-soft);color:#8a5500\"><svg width=\"20\" height=\"20\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\"><path d=\"M13 2L4 14h7l-1 8 9-12h-7z\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\"><\u002Fpath><\u002Fsvg><\u002Fdiv>\n        <span><span class=\"en\">Missed connection<\u002Fspan><span class=\"es\">Conexión perdida<\u002Fspan><\u002Fspan>\n        <span class=\"arrow\"><svg width=\"14\" height=\"14\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\"><path d=\"M6 9l6 6 6-6\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2.5\" stroke-linecap=\"round\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\"><\u002Fpath><\u002Fsvg><\u002Fspan>\n      <\u002Fbutton>\n      <div class=\"acc-body\"><div><div><span class=\"en\">If you missed a connection because a previous flight was delayed, the airline is responsible for rebooking you. Find a gate agent or counter immediately. Keep all boarding passes and receipts.<\u002Fspan><span class=\"es\">Si perdiste una conexión por un retraso, la aerolínea es responsable de reubicarte. Encuentra un agente o mostrador inmediatamente. Conserva todos los pases y recibos.<\u002Fspan><\u002Fdiv><\u002Fdiv><\u002Fdiv>\n    <\u002Fdiv>\n  <\u002Fdiv>\n\n  <!-- OFFICE -->\n  <div class=\"office reveal\">\n    <div class=\"office-head\">\n      <div class=\"ico\"><svg width=\"22\" height=\"22\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\"><rect x=\"2\" y=\"6\" width=\"20\" height=\"14\" rx=\"2\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\"><\u002Frect><path d=\"M2 8l10 6 10-6\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\" stroke-linecap=\"round\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\"><\u002Fpath><\u002Fsvg><\u002Fdiv>\n      <div><span class=\"t-label\"><span class=\"en\" data-comment-anchor=\"7295ddf4f1-span\">Office hours · Mon–Thu 7:30 am – 5:30 pm · Fri 8:00 am – 12:00 pm<\u002Fspan><span class=\"es\">Horario · Lun–Jue 7:30 am – 5:30 pm · Vie 8:00 am – 12:00 md<\u002Fspan><\u002Fspan><h4><span class=\"en\">CWTSatoTravel · U.S. Embassy Panama<\u002Fspan><span class=\"es\">CWTSatoTravel · Embajada EE.UU. Panamá<\u002Fspan><\u002Fh4><\u002Fdiv>\n    <\u002Fdiv>\n    <div class=\"office-people\">\n      <div class=\"person\">\n        <div class=\"role\"><span class=\"en\">Travel counselor<\u002Fspan><span class=\"es\">Asesor de viaje<\u002Fspan><\u002Fdiv>\n        <div class=\"name\">Abdel Aguilar<\u002Fdiv>\n        <a class=\"email\" href=\"mailto:aaguilar@mycwt.com.pa\">aaguilar@mycwt.com.pa →<\u002Fa>\n      <\u002Fdiv>\n      <div class=\"person\">\n        <div class=\"role\"><span class=\"en\">Travel counselor<\u002Fspan><span class=\"es\">Asesor de viaje<\u002Fspan><\u002Fdiv>\n        <div class=\"name\" data-comment-anchor=\"fb6c2799f1-div\">Félix Barrios<\u002Fdiv>\n        <a class=\"email\" href=\"mailto:fbarrios@mycwt.com.pa\">fbarrios@mycwt.com.pa →<\u002Fa>\n      <\u002Fdiv>\n    <\u002Fdiv>\n    <div class=\"office-grid\">\n      <div><div class=\"lab\"><span class=\"en\">Office phone<\u002Fspan><span class=\"es\">Teléfono<\u002Fspan><\u002Fdiv><div class=\"v\">+507 317 5473<br>+507 317 5144<\u002Fdiv><\u002Fdiv>\n      <div><div class=\"lab\"><span class=\"en\">Address<\u002Fspan><span class=\"es\">Dirección<\u002Fspan><\u002Fdiv><div class=\"v\">Bldg. 783 · 1st Floor<br>Clayton, Panama<\u002Fdiv><\u002Fdiv>\n      <div><div class=\"lab\"><span class=\"en\">Emergency · 24/7<\u002Fspan><span class=\"es\">Emergencia · 24/7<\u002Fspan><\u002Fdiv><div class=\"v\" style=\"color:var(--coral)\">+507 6612 4677<\u002Fdiv><\u002Fdiv>\n    <\u002Fdiv>\n  <\u002Fdiv>\n<\u002Fsection>\n<\u002Fmain>\n\n<!-- ============ FOOTER ============ -->\n<footer class=\"footer\">\n  <div class=\"cwt-logo lg on-dark\" aria-label=\"CWTSatoTravel\"><img src=\"f4c5c4d6-e699-4333-a904-d8f67642fcbe\" alt=\"CWTSatoTravel\"><\u002Fdiv>\n  <div class=\"foot-tag\"><span class=\"en\">Travel Management Center · Independently Owned &amp; Operated by Klassic Travel INC.<\u002Fspan><span class=\"es\">Travel Management Center · Propiedad y Operación Independiente de Klassic Travel INC.<\u002Fspan><\u002Fdiv>\n  <div class=\"foot-grid\">\n    <div class=\"foot-col\">\n      <div class=\"lab\"><span class=\"en\">Office<\u002Fspan><span class=\"es\">Oficina<\u002Fspan><\u002Fdiv>\n      <p>Bldg. 783 · 1st Floor<\u002Fp>\n      <p>Clayton, Panama<\u002Fp>\n      <p>+507 317 5473<\u002Fp>\n      <p>+507 317 5144<\u002Fp>\n    <\u002Fdiv>\n    <div class=\"foot-col\">\n      <div class=\"lab\"><span class=\"en\">Counselors<\u002Fspan><span class=\"es\">Asesores<\u002Fspan><\u002Fdiv>\n      <a href=\"mailto:aaguilar@mycwt.com.pa\">Abdel Aguilar<\u002Fa>\n      <a href=\"mailto:aaguilar@mycwt.com.pa\" style=\"font-size:11px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.5)\">aaguilar@mycwt.com.pa<\u002Fa>\n      <a href=\"mailto:fbarrios@mycwt.com.pa\" style=\"margin-top:8px;display:block\">Félix Barrios<\u002Fa>\n      <a href=\"mailto:fbarrios@mycwt.com.pa\" style=\"font-size:11px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.5)\">fbarrios@mycwt.com.pa<\u002Fa>\n    <\u002Fdiv>\n    <div class=\"foot-col\">\n      <div class=\"lab\"><span class=\"en\">Emergency · 24/7<\u002Fspan><span class=\"es\">Emergencia · 24/7<\u002Fspan><\u002Fdiv>\n      <a href=\"tel:+50766124677\" class=\"em\">+507 6612 4677<\u002Fa>\n      <p style=\"font-size:11px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.5);margin-top:6px\"><span class=\"en\">Voice only · No SMS or WhatsApp<\u002Fspan><span class=\"es\">Solo voz · Sin SMS o WhatsApp<\u002Fspan><\u002Fp>\n    <\u002Fdiv>\n    <div class=\"foot-col\">\n      <div class=\"lab\"><span class=\"en\">Languages<\u002Fspan><span class=\"es\">Idiomas<\u002Fspan><\u002Fdiv>\n      <p><span class=\"en\">English / Spanish<\u002Fspan><span class=\"es\">Inglés / Español<\u002Fspan><\u002Fp>\n      <p style=\"font-size:11px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.5);margin-top:6px\"><span class=\"en\">Toggle with EN/ES in top nav<\u002Fspan><span class=\"es\">Cambia con EN/ES arriba<\u002Fspan><\u002Fp>\n    <\u002Fdiv>\n  <\u002Fdiv>\n  <div class=\"foot-rule\"><\u002Fdiv>\n  <div class=\"foot-fine\">\n    <p><span class=\"en\">This guide is provided for informational purposes. Always verify requirements with official sources before travel. Airline policies are subject to change without notice.<\u002Fspan><span class=\"es\">Esta guía es con fines informativos. Verifica siempre los requisitos con fuentes oficiales antes de viajar. Las políticas de las aerolíneas pueden cambiar sin previo aviso.<\u002Fspan><\u002Fp>\n    <div class=\"legal\">\n      <strong>14 FAM 515 — <\u002Fstrong>\n      <span class=\"en\">It is the traveler's responsibility to ensure travel is performed correctly in accordance with prevailing law and regulations.<\u002Fspan>\n      <span class=\"es\">Es responsabilidad del viajero asegurar que el viaje se realice correctamente conforme a la ley y regulaciones vigentes.<\u002Fspan>\n    <\u002Fdiv>\n  <\u002Fdiv>\n<\u002Ffooter>\n\n<button class=\"scroll-top\" id=\"scrollTop\" onclick=\"scrollToTop()\" aria-label=\"Back to top\">\n  <svg width=\"20\" height=\"20\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\"><path d=\"M12 19V5m-7 7l7-7 7 7\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2.5\" stroke-linecap=\"round\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\"><\u002Fpath><\u002Fsvg>\n<\u002Fbutton>\n\n<!-- Lightbox -->\n<div class=\"lightbox\" id=\"lightbox\" onclick=\"closeLightbox(event)\">\n  <div class=\"lb-bar\">\n    <div class=\"meta\" id=\"lbMeta\">Terminal 1 · Level 100<\u002Fdiv>\n    <div class=\"lb-tools\">\n      <button onclick=\"lbZoom(-0.2)\" aria-label=\"Zoom out\">−<\u002Fbutton>\n      <button onclick=\"lbZoom(0.2)\" aria-label=\"Zoom in\">+<\u002Fbutton>\n      <button onclick=\"lbZoom('reset')\" aria-label=\"Reset zoom\"><svg width=\"14\" height=\"14\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\"><path d=\"M3 7V3h4M21 7V3h-4M3 17v4h4M21 17v4h-4\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2.5\" stroke-linecap=\"round\"><\u002Fpath><\u002Fsvg><\u002Fbutton>\n      <button onclick=\"closeLightbox()\" aria-label=\"Close\">✕<\u002Fbutton>\n    <\u002Fdiv>\n  <\u002Fdiv>\n  <button class=\"lb-nav prev\" onclick=\"lbNav(-1,event)\" aria-label=\"Previous map\">‹<\u002Fbutton>\n  <button class=\"lb-nav next\" onclick=\"lbNav(1,event)\" aria-label=\"Next map\">›<\u002Fbutton>\n  <div class=\"lb-stage\" id=\"lbStage\" onclick=\"event.stopPropagation()\">\n    <img id=\"lbImg\" alt=\"\" style=\"display:none\">\n  <\u002Fdiv>\n<\u002Fdiv>\n\n<script>\n/* ============ LANG ============ */\nfunction setLang(l){\n  document.documentElement.dataset.lang = l;\n  document.getElementById('btnEn').classList.toggle('on', l==='en');\n  document.getElementById('btnEs').classList.toggle('on', l==='es');\n  try{localStorage.setItem('cwt_lang',l)}catch(_){}\n}\n(function(){try{const l=localStorage.getItem('cwt_lang');if(l==='es') setLang('es');}catch(_){}})();\n\n/* ============ MENU ============ */\nfunction toggleMenu(){\n  const h=document.getElementById('hamburger');\n  const m=document.getElementById('sideMenu');\n  const o=document.getElementById('overlay');\n  const open=!m.classList.contains('open');\n  h.classList.toggle('open',open);h.setAttribute('aria-expanded',open?'true':'false');\n  m.classList.toggle('open',open);o.classList.toggle('open',open);\n  document.body.style.overflow=open?'hidden':'';\n}\ndocument.addEventListener('keydown',e=>{\n  if(e.key==='Escape'){\n    document.getElementById('hamburger').classList.remove('open');\n    document.getElementById('sideMenu').classList.remove('open');\n    document.getElementById('overlay').classList.remove('open');\n    document.body.style.overflow='';\n    closeLightbox();\n  }\n});\n\n/* ============ SCROLL TOP ============ */\nfunction scrollToTop(){window.scrollTo({top:0,behavior:'smooth'})}\nwindow.addEventListener('scroll',()=>{\n  document.getElementById('scrollTop').classList.toggle('visible',window.scrollY>500);\n});\n\n/* ============ CHECKLIST ============ */\nconst CL_KEY='cwt_checklist_v2';\nfunction saveCl(){try{const ids=[...document.querySelectorAll('.cl-item')].map(i=>i.classList.contains('checked')?1:0);localStorage.setItem(CL_KEY,JSON.stringify(ids))}catch(_){}}\nfunction restoreCl(){try{const raw=localStorage.getItem(CL_KEY);if(!raw)return;const arr=JSON.parse(raw);[...document.querySelectorAll('.cl-item')].forEach((el,i)=>{if(arr[i])el.classList.add('checked')});updateClMeter()}catch(_){}}\nfunction updateClMeter(){\n  const items=[...document.querySelectorAll('.cl-item')];\n  const done=items.filter(i=>i.classList.contains('checked')).length;\n  const total=items.length;\n  document.getElementById('ringNum').textContent=done+'/'+total;\n  const C=2*Math.PI*68;\n  const off=C*(1-done/total);\n  document.getElementById('ringFg').setAttribute('stroke-dashoffset',off);\n  const s=document.getElementById('ringStatus');\n  if(done===total){s.classList.add('done');s.innerHTML='<span class=\"en\">✓ Ready to fly<\u002Fspan><span class=\"es\">✓ Listo para volar<\u002Fspan>'}\n  else if(done===0){s.classList.remove('done');s.innerHTML='<span class=\"en\">Tap items to check them off<\u002Fspan><span class=\"es\">Toca para marcar<\u002Fspan>'}\n  else{s.classList.remove('done');s.innerHTML='<span class=\"en\">'+(total-done)+' to go<\u002Fspan><span class=\"es\">'+(total-done)+' por revisar<\u002Fspan>'}\n}\ndocument.querySelectorAll('.cl-item').forEach(item=>{\n  item.addEventListener('click',()=>{item.classList.toggle('checked');saveCl();updateClMeter();});\n});\nrestoreCl();updateClMeter();\n\n/* ============ BAG TOGGLE ============ */\nfunction toggleBag(el){\n  const wasActive=el.classList.contains('active');\n  document.querySelectorAll('.bag-card').forEach(c=>{c.classList.remove('active');c.setAttribute('aria-pressed','false')});\n  if(!wasActive){el.classList.add('active');el.setAttribute('aria-pressed','true')}\n}\n\n/* ============ AIRLINE TABS ============ */\nfunction showAirline(btn){\n  const k=btn.dataset.al;\n  document.querySelectorAll('.airline-tab').forEach(t=>t.classList.remove('active'));\n  document.querySelectorAll('.airline-panel').forEach(p=>p.classList.remove('active'));\n  btn.classList.add('active');\n  document.getElementById('panel-'+k).classList.add('active');\n}\n\n/* ============ ACCORDION ============ */\nfunction toggleAcc(btn){\n  const item=btn.parentElement;\n  const wasOpen=item.classList.contains('open');\n  // close siblings within same .acc\n  item.parentElement.querySelectorAll('.acc-item').forEach(i=>{i.classList.remove('open');const b=i.querySelector('.acc-head');if(b)b.setAttribute('aria-expanded','false')});\n  if(!wasOpen){item.classList.add('open');btn.setAttribute('aria-expanded','true')}\n}\n\n/* ============ STEPS — CHECK-IN ============ */\nfunction setStep(n){\n  document.querySelectorAll('#ciSteps .step').forEach(s=>{\n    const sn=+s.dataset.step;\n    s.classList.toggle('active',sn===n);\n    s.classList.toggle('done',sn<=n);\n  });\n  document.querySelectorAll('#phoneScreens .phone-screen').forEach(p=>{\n    p.classList.toggle('show', +p.dataset.screen===n);\n  });\n  const dots=document.querySelectorAll('#phoneDots i');\n  dots.forEach((d,i)=>d.classList.toggle('on', i+1===n));\n}\nlet _stepInt;\nfunction autoCycleSteps(){\n  let n=1;\n  _stepInt=setInterval(()=>{n=n>=4?1:n+1;setStep(n)},3800);\n}\nconst ciObserver=new IntersectionObserver((entries)=>{\n  entries.forEach(e=>{\n    if(e.isIntersecting && !_stepInt){autoCycleSteps()}\n    else if(!e.isIntersecting && _stepInt){clearInterval(_stepInt);_stepInt=null}\n  });\n},{threshold:0.4});\nconst ciEl=document.getElementById('ciSteps');if(ciEl)ciObserver.observe(ciEl);\n// user click cancels auto cycle\ndocument.querySelectorAll('#ciSteps .step').forEach(s=>s.addEventListener('click',()=>{if(_stepInt){clearInterval(_stepInt);_stepInt=null}}));\n\n/* ============ STEPS — KIOSK ============ */\nconst kioskCopy=[\n  {h:{en:\"Welcome — let's get you checked in\",es:'Bienvenido — comencemos tu check-in'},p:{en:'Find your booking using one of the options below.',es:'Encuentra tu reserva con una de las opciones.'}},\n  {h:{en:'Identify yourself',es:'Identifícate'},p:{en:'Scan your passport or enter your PNR to continue.',es:'Escanea tu pasaporte o ingresa tu PNR.'}},\n  {h:{en:'Confirm flight & seat',es:'Confirma vuelo y asiento'},p:{en:'Verify the flight is yours and choose a seat.',es:'Verifica que el vuelo sea tuyo y elige asiento.'}},\n  {h:{en:'Print pass & bag tags',es:'Imprime pase y etiquetas'},p:{en:'Take printouts to bag drop if checking bags.',es:'Lleva los impresos al bag drop si tienes maletas.'}}\n];\nfunction setKioskStep(n){\n  document.querySelectorAll('[data-kstep]').forEach(s=>{\n    const sn=+s.dataset.kstep;\n    s.classList.toggle('active',sn===n);\n    s.classList.toggle('done',sn<=n);\n  });\n  // pages\n  document.querySelectorAll('#kioskPages .kiosk-page').forEach(p=>{\n    p.classList.toggle('show', +p.dataset.kpage===n);\n  });\n  // progress bar\n  document.querySelectorAll('#kioskProgress i').forEach((d,i)=>d.classList.toggle('on', i<n));\n  // printing state — only on last step\n  const kiosk=document.querySelector('.kiosk');\n  if(kiosk){ kiosk.classList.toggle('printing', n===4); }\n  // 'hot' highlight on the entry button only on welcome\n  document.querySelectorAll('.kiosk-page[data-kpage=\"1\"] .kiosk-actions .btn').forEach((b,i)=>{\n    b.classList.toggle('is-hot', i===0 && n===1);\n  });\n}\nlet _kInt=null;\nfunction autoCycleKiosk(){\n  let n=1;\n  _kInt=setInterval(()=>{n=n>=4?1:n+1;setKioskStep(n)},4200);\n}\nconst kObserver=new IntersectionObserver((entries)=>{\n  entries.forEach(e=>{\n    if(e.isIntersecting && !_kInt){ autoCycleKiosk(); }\n  });\n},{threshold:0.4});\nconst kEl=document.getElementById('kioskScreen');if(kEl)kObserver.observe(kEl);\ndocument.querySelectorAll('[data-kstep]').forEach(s=>s.addEventListener('click',()=>{if(_kInt){clearInterval(_kInt);_kInt=null}}));\n\n/* ============ TERMINAL TABS ============ */\nfunction showTerm(btn){\n  const k=btn.dataset.term;\n  document.querySelectorAll('.term-tabs button').forEach(t=>t.classList.remove('active'));\n  document.querySelectorAll('.term-panel').forEach(p=>p.classList.remove('active'));\n  btn.classList.add('active');\n  document.getElementById('term-'+k).classList.add('active');\n}\nfunction showLevel(btn,term){\n  const lvl=btn.dataset.lvl;\n  const wrap=document.querySelector('.maps-wrap[data-term=\"'+term+'\"]');\n  wrap.querySelectorAll('.lvl-tabs button').forEach(t=>t.classList.remove('active'));\n  wrap.querySelectorAll('.map-frame .panel').forEach(p=>p.classList.remove('active'));\n  btn.classList.add('active');\n  wrap.querySelector('.map-frame .panel[data-lvl=\"'+lvl+'\"]').classList.add('active');\n  const labels={'100':{en:'Level 100 · Ground floor',es:'Nivel 100 · Planta baja'},'200':{en:'Level 200 · Check-In',es:'Nivel 200 · Check-In'},'300':{en:'Level 300 · Food Court',es:'Nivel 300 · Restaurantes'}};\n  const l=labels[lvl];\n  const h=document.getElementById(term+'-h');\n  if(h) h.innerHTML='<span class=\"en\">'+l.en+'<\u002Fspan><span class=\"es\">'+l.es+'<\u002Fspan>';\n}\n\n/* ============ LIGHTBOX ============ */\nlet lbState={t:'t1',l:100,zoom:1};\nfunction openLightbox(t,l){\n  lbState={t,l,zoom:1};\n  const img=document.querySelector('.maps-wrap[data-term=\"'+t+'\"] .panel[data-lvl=\"'+l+'\"] img');\n  if(!img)return;\n  const lbImg=document.getElementById('lbImg');\n  lbImg.src=img.src;lbImg.style.transform='scale(1)';lbImg.style.display='block';\n  document.getElementById('lbMeta').textContent='Terminal '+(t==='t1'?'1':'2')+' · Level '+l;\n  document.getElementById('lightbox').classList.add('open');\n  document.body.style.overflow='hidden';\n}\nfunction closeLightbox(e){\n  if(e && e.target && !e.target.closest('.lb-stage') && !e.target.matches('img') && !e.target.closest('.lb-nav') && !e.target.closest('.lb-tools')){\n    document.getElementById('lightbox').classList.remove('open');document.body.style.overflow='';return;\n  }\n  if(!e){document.getElementById('lightbox').classList.remove('open');document.body.style.overflow=''}\n}\nfunction lbZoom(d){\n  if(d==='reset'){lbState.zoom=1}\n  else{lbState.zoom=Math.max(0.5,Math.min(3,lbState.zoom+d))}\n  document.getElementById('lbImg').style.transform='scale('+lbState.zoom+')';\n  document.getElementById('lbImg').style.transformOrigin='center top';\n}\nfunction lbNav(dir,e){\n  e&&e.stopPropagation();\n  const levels=[100,200,300];\n  let idx=levels.indexOf(lbState.l)+dir;\n  if(idx<0)idx=levels.length-1;if(idx>=levels.length)idx=0;\n  openLightbox(lbState.t,levels[idx]);\n}\n\n/* ============ REVEAL ============ */\nconst ro=new IntersectionObserver((entries)=>{\n  entries.forEach(e=>{if(e.isIntersecting){e.target.classList.add('in');ro.unobserve(e.target)}});\n},{threshold:0.12,rootMargin:'0px 0px -40px 0px'});\ndocument.querySelectorAll('.reveal').forEach(el=>ro.observe(el));\n\n/* ============ ACTIVE RAIL/MENU ============ */\nconst sectionIds=['before','baggage','requirements','checkin','kiosk','tocumen','boarding','disruptions'];\nconst navObserver=new IntersectionObserver((entries)=>{\n  entries.forEach(e=>{\n    if(e.isIntersecting){\n      const id=e.target.id;\n      document.querySelectorAll('.rail a, .side-menu a').forEach(a=>{\n        a.classList.toggle('current', a.dataset.target===id);\n      });\n    }\n  });\n},{rootMargin:'-50% 0px -45% 0px'});\nsectionIds.forEach(id=>{const el=document.getElementById(id);if(el)navObserver.observe(el);});\n\n/* keyboard arrow nav in lightbox */\ndocument.addEventListener('keydown',e=>{\n  const lb=document.getElementById('lightbox');\n  if(lb.classList.contains('open')){\n    if(e.key==='ArrowRight')lbNav(1,e);\n    if(e.key==='ArrowLeft')lbNav(-1,e);\n    if(e.key==='+'||e.key==='=')lbZoom(0.2);\n    if(e.key==='-')lbZoom(-0.2);\n    if(e.key==='0')lbZoom('reset');\n  }\n});\n<\u002Fscript>\n\n\n<\u002Fbody><\u002Fhtml>"
  </script>
</body>
</html>
